title: Cryptool officially launches at app.cryptool.io
content_html:
Cryptool is officially live at app.cryptool.io. Three things are open from day one:

  • Full account creation and onboarding for new users
  • The referral programme, paying revenue share on every successful referral, no cap on the number of referrals
  • The portfolio and investment toolkit for individual investors and fund managers

Anyone on the early supporter list can register with the same email they originally signed up with, and their account is upgraded automatically. If you need to change your email, the support team will sort it.

Bigger releases are already queued.
author: Cryptool
